allow: PowerShell($ports = @\(3000,3001,3002,3003\); $live = $null; foreach \($p in $ports\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$p/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; $live = $p; break } catch {} }; if \($live\) { "Dev server on $live" } else { "No dev server running" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { foreach \($x in $c\) { Stop-Process -Id $x.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400 }; $c2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c2\) { 'still listening' } else { 'port 3000 free' })
Bash(git commit -q --amend -m 'chore: 建立版本控制与协作流程 \(v0.2.0\)' -m '- 初始化 Git 仓库，纳入信阳市建筑装修协会网站现有代码作为基线 *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'docs: 确定发布节奏为每次改动直接定版本 \(v0.2.1\)' -m '- CONVENTIONS.md：协作流程第1条改为「每次改动直接定版本并提交」，不用未发布缓冲区 *)

PowerShell($ports = 3000,3001,3002; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { foreach \($x in $c\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $x.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $\($x.OwningProcess\) on port $p" } catch {} } } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c2\) { "port $p STILL busy" } else { "port $p free" } })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'docs: 记录双主页/三门面架构为核心特性 \(v0.2.2\)' -m '- CONVENTIONS.md：新增「双主页/三门面」域名分流架构说明（消费者/协会xh/企业子站） *)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { foreach \($x in $c\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $x.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed $\($x.OwningProcess\)" } catch {} } } ; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "3000 busy" } else { "3000 free" })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'fix\(docs\): 纠正协会门户本地访问方式 \(v0.2.3\)' -m '- xh.localhost:3000 在 Windows 浏览器不解析，改荐 localhost:3000/xh 或 xh.lvh.me:3000 *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat\(启动\): 轮询就绪再开浏览器，删除生产模式脚本 \(v0.3.0\)' -m '- 启动.bat 改为轮询 localhost:3000 就绪后再自动打开浏览器，修复打开过早导致无法访问 *)
Bash(xargs -0 -I{} sed -i 's/建筑装修协会/建筑装饰装修协会/g' "{}")
